data_scope: APPROVE_WITH_EXCEPTIONS for VS3 continuation only: local migration/backup/restore rehearsal is acceptable. This record does not approve production-like data, real on-prem data, destructive migration, production migration readiness, restore readiness, or rollback readiness.
redaction_note: No raw secrets, provider credentials, private keys, session cookies, bearer tokens, live database exports, production payloads, customer data, or unredacted backup contents are included. This record allows local migration/backup/restore rehearsal for VS3 continuation only. Before final product release or any real on-prem readiness claim, a production-like non-destructive drill must verify migration, backup, restore, rollback, quarantine behavior, tenant isolation/RLS, policy inventory, audit integrity, and evidence/action/search reproducibility.
